description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex roofline featuring multiple gables and a mix of flat and pitched sections. The exterior is primarily finished in a light brown brick or siding, with white trim around the windows and doors, and decorative architectural elements such as bay windows and a turret-like corner. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. A spacious backyard includes a wooden deck and a rectangular swimming pool with lounge chairs, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and recreation. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by columns and detailed with geometric window arrangements. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a visually appealing and functional family residence.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a complex roofline, white-trimmed windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and deck. The design combines traditional and modern elements with detailed entryway and decorative features.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entryway, bay windows, turret-like corner, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlighting the flat roof sections, backyard deck, and swimming pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the expansive wooden deck, pool, and symmetrical window arrangement on the back facade.
description_view_3: Side and rear perspective showing the fence, trees, and the transition between the house and outdoor living spaces.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay and turret windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with columns, central door, and decorative white trim
